---
title: '2014/06/14 camp and weblogs'
date: '2014-06-15T04:14:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2454909058084450193'
blogger_filename: '/2014/06/20140614-camp-and-weblogs.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>Going to bed. Connor is home both kids had awesome times at camp!!! </p>
<p>Flavia sparked an idea ... what if I started treating my dw blog as a journal.&nbsp; Stop trying to be the polished teacher and start being the raw fellow traveler... ?</p>
